name: ePost RX Modernisation - Fix all failed test case and improve the coverage Part 1
description:
# Detail Requirement
* Fix remain 2 failed test cases.
1. RsGetOrdersServiceImplTest.test_getRsOrders_invoiceNumNotNull_1:419 » ClassCast
2. RsGetOrdersServiceImplTest.test_getRsOrders_invoiceNumNotNull_2:474 » ClassCast
3. RsGetOrdersServiceImplTest.test_getRsOrders_requestTypeS:364
* Improve both line and branch coverage > 85%. (**Only epost-get-orders module is in scope**)

# Steps to run the test
Basically, you can follow the README.md under epost-get-orders module to run the test. Here is some instructions for reference as well:
1. Run docker image: go to epost-rx-common/docker, run `docker-compose up -d`
2. Install the common module: go to epost-rx-common, run `mvn clean install`
3. Run the test: go to epost-get-orders, run `mvn clean test`
# Submission Guidelines
Please submit a .zip file that includes:
- the updated codebase.

name: ePost RX Modernisation - Fix all failed test case and improve the coverage Part 2
description:
# Detail Requirement
* Fix remain 55 failed test cases: [ERROR] Tests run: 322, Failures: 0, Errors: 53, Skipped: 0
* Improve both line and branch coverage > 85%. (**Only epost-rx-phase2 module is in scope**)

# Steps to run the test
Basically, you can follow the README.md under epost-rx-phase2 module to run the test. Here is some instructions for reference as well:
1. Run docker image: go to epost-rx-common/docker, run `docker-compose up -d`
2. Install the common module: go to epost-rx-common, run `mvn clean install`
3. Run the test: go to epost-rx-phase2, run `mvn clean test`

# Submission Guidelines
Please submit a .zip file that includes:
- the updated codebase.
